zh.Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德米德爾可普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthonis Claessen於1516年出生在荷蘭霍蘭時，他的父親Claas Willemsz van Deventer42歲，母親Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen27歲。他和Anna Claes Dirczdr至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1568年享年52歲。

zh-hans.Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德米德爾可普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anthonis Claessen于1516年出生在荷兰霍蘭时，他的父亲Claas Willemsz van Deventer42岁，母亲Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen27岁。他和Anna Claes Dirczdr至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1568年享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Claessen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German, Norwegian, and Danish: variant of   Clausen  .

variants.name: Clausen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Holger, Bente, Ingard, Niels, Ansgar, Astrid, Bent, Bjorn, Erik, Evald, Jorgen, Knud.

North German, Danish, and Norwegian: patronymic from the personal name Claus , a shortened form of Nikolaus (see Nicholas ). In North America, this surname is also an altered form of the variants Claussen and Klausen . Compare Clauson 1.

nameMeanings.name: Anthonis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Antonia  , modelled on the spelling of   Anthony .

variants.name: Antonia
meanings: feminine form of   Anthony  , unaltered since classical times, when it was a common Roman feminine family name.

historicEvents.description: The Catholic King Charles I of Spain ruled the Netherlands.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthonis Claessen was born in 1516, in Holland, Netherlands, his father, Claas Willemsz van Deventer, was 42 and his mother, Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, was 27. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Anna Claes Dirczdr. He died in 1568, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthonis Claessen est né en 1516, à Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Claas Willemsz van Deventer, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Anna Claes Dirczdr. Il est décédé en 1568, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthonis Claessen 1516 in Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Claas Willemsz van Deventer 42 und seine Mutter Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen 27. Er hatte mit Anna Claes Dirczdr mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1568 im Alter von 52 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthonis Claessen è nato il nel 1516 nel Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Claas Willemsz van Deventer, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Anna Claes Dirczdr. Morì nel 1568, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Leerdam, Sudholland, Niederlande: オランダズイド-hオランドリールダム
ja.Middelkoop, South Holland, Netherlands: オランダズイド-hオランドミッドエルコオップ
ja.lifeSummary: Anthonis Claessenが1516年にオランダホーランドで生まれた時，父Claas Willemsz van Deventerは42歳，母Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferenは27歳であった。彼はAnna Claes Dirczdrとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1568年に52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthonis Claessen(이)가 1516년 네덜란드 홀랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Claas Willemsz van Deventer(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Anna Claes Dirczdr(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthonis Claessen nasceu em 1516, em Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Claas Willemsz van Deventer, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Anna Claes Dirczdr. Ele faleceu em 1568, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthonis Claessen родился в 1516 г. в местности холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Claas Willemsz van Deventer было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, 27. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Anna Claes Dirczdr. Он умер в 1568 г. в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anthonis Claessen nació en 1516, en Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Claas Willemsz van Deventer, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margriet Cornelisdr van Aefferen, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Anna Claes Dirczdr. Murió en 1568, a la edad de 52 años.
